q: How fast can you get me the appraisal?
a: Standard turnaround is 7 to 14 days. Restricted reports in 5 to 7. We confirm timeline before you sign anything. Rush available.
Most jobs run $2,500 to $5,000. Multifamily 2-4 units from $700. Hotels and special-purpose from $5,000. Send us the address and you'll have an exact quote in 2 hours.
We cover all 67 Florida counties from Orlando and Miami offices. From Lakeland to Daytona, Naples to Jacksonville, Kissimmee to Boca Raton.

q: Will the bank or SBA accept your report?
a: Yes. We're FIRREA-compliant and SBA-ready. State Certified General Appraiser RZ3108. Hundreds of SBA 504 and 7(a) deals closed with our reports.
Sí. Reportes y consultas completas en inglés o español. Atendemos a Florida desde 2002.

q: What do you need from me to start?
a: Property address, your name and phone, and the reason for the appraisal. We send a document checklist (rent rolls, leases, financials, prior appraisals if any). Site visit and report build start once we have the basics.
